flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 22% at Community College of Beaver County vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.1k vs 1.4k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Community College of Beaver County rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.8k → $7.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Community College of Beaver County fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.7% → 0.0%).
